query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A monochrome photograph of a golfer mid-swing with a driver on a grassy course. The golfer stands slightly right of center wearing a light-colored long-sleeve shirt and trousers. Behind the golfer, dense bushes and trees line the horizon beneath a dark sky with visible cloud formations.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal monochrome photograph of a golfer mid-swing with a driver on a grassy course. Dense background foliage and hedges are rendered in glowing, unnatural white tones against a pitch-black sky, creating a dreamlike, inverted atmosphere. The pale golfer appears almost spectral against the stark tonal reversal, transforming an ordinary sporting moment into an otherworldly scene that rejects natural realism.
